goal: compose[Z, Y, X](g1, g2, compose[X, Y, Z](f2, f1, x)) = x
compose[Z, Y, X](g1, g2)(compose[X, Y, Z](f2, f1)(x)) = x
compose[X, Y, Z](f2, f1, compose[Z, Y, X](g1, g2, z)) = z
compose[X, Y, Z](f2, f1)(compose[Z, Y, X](g1, g2)(z)) = z
is_homeomorphism[X, Z](compose[X, Y, Z](f2, f1), compose[Z, Y, X](g1, g2))
